sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96574" key="sterewtiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στερε-ωτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n96574.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">strengthening, consolidating</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">σαρκός</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:6:32:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.32.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
